blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define retry policy and backoff mechanism
Verify the existence and configuration of the retry policy and backoff mechanism for delivery attempts.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Delivery attempts with retry policy and backoff'. While the linked use case describes a scenario where delivery retries occur, it does not provide concrete evidence of the implementation of a retry policy or backoff mechanism. The evidence only mentions that the WhatsApp provider times out and retries, but lacks details on the actual retry policy and backoff strategy, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No concrete evidence of the retry policy and backoff mechanism implementation.
